mapper.update: UPDATE t_message_warn t1 LEFT JOIN t_message_reply t2 ON t1.other_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN t_message t3 ON t2.message_id = t3.id SET t1.is_read = true WHERE (t1.type in ('NEWS','THUMP_UP') AND t1.is_read = false AND t1.is_delete = false AND t1.wechat_user_id = #{wechatUserId} AND t3.id = #{messageId})
